source_label: Assran et al., 'Self-Supervised Learning from Images with a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture' (arXiv 2301.08243, CVPR 2023)
notes: Meta's image self-supervised model (Image JEPA); the 'I' is the letter 'eye' /aɪ/ and JEPA is one word /ˈdʒɛpə/ rhyming with 'pepper', so 'eye-JEP-uh' — the way LeCun voices the suffix. Predicts in latent space, not pixels.
